title: SR Flip-Flop Logic Diagram and Truth Table
description: A visual representation of a basic Set-Reset (SR) flip-flop built from NAND gates, showing its internal logic circuit alongside its truth table to explain its operation and state changes.
relationships: The output of NAND Gate 1 is connected to an input of NAND Gate 2, and vice-versa, creating a feedback loop. The S input feeds into NAND Gate 1, and the R input feeds into NAND Gate 2. The outputs Q and Q' are always complementary.
